name: Allen W.
text: Dylan is a lifesaver. Not only was he able to help us get our boat that had fallen partially off the trailer back on, he also did repairs on our trailer. Super honest, very reasonable, timely and responsive. I'm going to be using him for years.

name: Brantley S.
text: I purchased a new boat and needed it to be looked over and getting it water ready. Dylan is the guy. He was quick to respond and was very knowledgeable. He came to my house, took the boat and trailer, did what he needed to do and explained everything to me. I would recommend him for all your boat needs.

name: Dennis H.
text: Blowed a trailer hub on the way to vacation. Dylan came to hotel picked it up. 2 new axles, 4 new hubs, new brakes and leaf springs and delivered it back to me. Kept me posted and explained my options. Great guy, great work.
